text.title: Ads Conversion Tracking Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of Ads Conversion Tracking MUST enforce. Rationale + source per rule. Rules referenced by id from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Server-side conversion API (CAPI / enhanced / LinkedIn API) MUST be implemented alongside browser pixel. Browser-only is rejected.
rule.rationale: Browser-only loses 20-40% of events; smart bidding optimizes on incomplete data; CPA misleads.

rule.statement: Every conversion event MUST carry a dedup_key (event_id) so server + browser events don't double-count.
rule.rationale: Without dedup key, server + browser events double-count; CPA misreports + bidding misfires.

rule.statement: Attribution window MUST match sales-cycle median. Default 7-day click windows misfit long-cycle B2B.
rule.rationale: Window mismatch under-credits real conversions; smart bidding optimizes on wrong signal.

rule.statement: Every conversion event MUST carry $ value (predicted or actual). Value-less events are rejected.
rule.rationale: Without $ value, smart bidding cannot target ROAS; falls back to volume optimization which destroys margin.

rule.statement: Every event MUST pass DebugView + CRM-cross-check before campaigns go live. Un-verified events run silent.
rule.rationale: Silent broken events cost full-month budget before discovery.

rule.statement: If applicability preconditions are unmet (see AGENTS.md Skip If), the methodology MUST be skipped and a one-line skip-reason logged.
rule.rationale: A named skip terminal keeps decision-tree leaves resolvable and prevents silent misuse on misfit inputs.
